raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad peegahje Juhda Behr- 
ni pee Josuus Gilgalâ / un Kah- 
r: lebs Jewunna Dehls/tas Keenisite- 
ris fazzija us winnu : Tu sinui to 
Wahrdn / ko tas KUNGS us 
Mohsu to Deewa Wihru / Kah- 
des Barnea runnajs irr/ mannis 
pehz/ un tewis pehz.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es biju tfchetrddefinitts Gad- 
dus wezz / kad Mohsus ta KUN- 
GA Kalps/mann fuhtija no Kah- 
des-Barneas to Semmi islух- 
koht/ un es atfazziju winnam/ itt 
kà tas mannâ Sirdi bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet manni Brahti/ kas ar 
mannim bija us augfchu gahju- 
chi/ darrija to Eauschn Sirdi bai- 
ligu / bet es pareisi tam KUN- 
GAM mañam Deewain klaustiju.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad swehreja Mohsus tai 
Deenâ/ un fazztja: Ta Semme/ 
us ko tu ar tawu Rahju efi min- 
pis / buhs tew un taweem Behr- 
neem par eemantojamu Tersfu 
muhsham; jo tu efi tam KUN- 
GAM mannaim Deewani parei- 
si klaustijis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nu rangi/ tas KUNGS 
irr mannu Dsihwibu usturrejs/ 
ittin ka wiꞥsch runnajs irr/ nu irr 
tfchetrddefinitts un peez Gaddi no 
ta Laika / kad tas KUNGS scho 
Wahrdn us Mohsu runnoja/ I- 
sraëtam Tukfueji statgajoht / un 
nu rangi/ es esmu schodeen aston- 
definitts peez Gaddus wezz.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Esesinu wehl schodeen tik
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un nu / dohdi mann scho 
Kalna-Seini / no ka tas KUNGS 
tai Deenâ runnajs irr / jo tu efi 
tai Deenâ to dsirdejs/ jo tur dsih- 
wo Eenakim/ un tur irr seeli stiprs 
Pilsfahti / jaschn buhs taē 
KUNGS ar mannim/ ka es tohe 
isdsiht warnu / itt kàtas KUNGS 
runnajs irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad swehtija Josuus win- 
nu/ un dewe Kahlebam/ Jewunna 
Dehtam Eebronu par Jhpaschu- 
mu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tikke Eebrons Kahle- 
bam/ Jewunna Dehiam/tam Keeni- 
nisiteram par Jhpaschimu / lihds 
ichai paichai Deenai / pehz to / ka 
tas tam KUNGAM tam Israëta 
Deewam pareisi bij klaustijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nu tas Wahrdg Ge- 
brons/ bija pirmos Laikòs Kiriat- 
Arba/ kas weens feels Zilweks bi- 
jis irr starp teem Eenakim / un ta 
Semme dusseja no Karroscha- 
nas.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
